headline: Knight-Swift Q1 Earnings Match Estimates, Decrease Year Over Year
summary: KNX posts Q1 EPS in line with estimates but plunges 67.9% YoY, as weak segment performance and rising costs weigh despite modest revenue growth.

raw.headline: Knight-Swift Q1 Earnings Match Estimates, Decrease Year Over Year
raw.summary: KNX posts Q1 EPS in line with estimates but plunges 67.9% YoY, as weak segment performance and rising costs weigh despite modest revenue growth.

headline: United CEO says merger talks with American have ended
summary: United Airlines CEO Scott Kirby said in a public statement Monday morning that merger talks with American Airlines had ended.

raw.headline: United CEO says merger talks with American have ended
